## Verses (29)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O give praise to the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Let Israel now say, that his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Let the house of Aaron now say, that his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Let all worshippers of the Lord now say, that his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | I made my prayer to the Lord in my trouble: and the Lord gave me an answer, and put me in a wide place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The Lord is on my side; I will have no fear: what is man able to do to me? | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The Lord is my great helper: I will see my desire against my haters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | It is better to have faith in the Lord than to put one's hope in man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | It is better to have faith in the Lord than to put one's hope in rulers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | All the nations have come round me; but in the name of the Lord I will have them cut down. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | They are round me, yes, they are all about me; but in the name of the Lord I will have them cut down. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | They are round me like bees; but they are put out like a fire among thorns; for in the name of the Lord I will have them cut down. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | I have been hard pushed by you, so that I might have a fall: but the Lord was my helper. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | The Lord is my strength and my song; he has become my salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | The sound of joy and salvation is in the tents of the upright; the right hand of the Lord does works of power. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The right hand of the Lord is lifted up; the right hand of the Lord does works of power. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Life and not death will be my part, and I will give out the story of the works of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | The hand of Jah has been hard on me; but he has not given me up to death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Let the doors of righteousness be open to me; I will go in and give praise to the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | This is the door of the Lord's house; the workers of righteousness will go in through it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | I will give you praise, for you have given me an answer, and have become my salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | The stone which the builders put on one side has become the chief stone of the building. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | This is the Lord's doing; it is a wonder in our eyes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | This is the day which the Lord has made; we will be full of joy and delight in it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | Send salvation now, O Lord; Lord, send us your blessing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | A blessing be on him who comes in the name of the Lord; we give you blessing from the house of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | The Lord is God, and he has given us light; let the holy dance be ordered with branches, even up to the horns of the altar. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | You are my God, and I will give you praise; my God, and I will give honour to your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | O give praise to the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
